settings.label: Default social sharing image
settings.info: Used as the og:image fallback on non-product pages (home, collection, etc). Recommended size: 1200 × 630 px.

settings.label: Twitter / X handle
settings.info: Enter without the @ symbol, e.g. therepclub. Used for twitter:site and twitter:creator tags.

settings.label: Instagram profile URL
settings.info: Full URL, e.g. https://www.instagram.com/therepclub. Added to the Organisation schema sameAs field.
